title: Vanmam
desc: Friends Radha and Chelladurai lead a carefree life. When Radha accidentally kills Chelladurai's brother-in-law, it turns them bitter foes, and a cunning man uses their enmity to his benefits

title: Anbe Un Vasam
desc: A boy falls in love with a girl who also reciprocates his feelings. Scared by another love affair going sour, he proposes to her. But, things go wrong when her point of view differs from his.

title: 12 B
desc: While working at a friend's garage, Shakti falls in love with Jotika. However, her parents want her to marry Pratap, a rich businessman. What will be the outcome of this love triangle

title: Style
desc: Four college friends try to help two lovers get married against the wishes of their parents. The attempts of the youngsters lead to hilarious consequences.

title: Minnale
desc: A man falls in love with a woman and cons his way into her heart through lies. When she finds out and confronts him, he has no sign of remorse as he feels that everything is fair in love and war.

title: Coimbatore Mappllai
desc: Balu comes to the city for better opportunities and stays with his friend. He falls in love with Sumithra, his landlord, but her evil cousin, Mahesh, creates a rift between them.

title: Gummalam
desc: Four friends fall in love with Rathi when she moves in into their neighbour's house. Later, the police arrest her and they all get shocked to learn about her true identity.

title: Edhyathai Thirudathey
desc: Prakash, who is diagnosed with terminal cancer, and Geethanjali, an equally ill patient, fall in love with each other. However, when she learns about his illness, she decides to move out of his life.

title: Vasantha Vaasal
desc: Vijay, Divya's tenant, aspires to become an actor and constantly disturbs her by reciting movie dialogues loudly. Divya, who wants to excel in studies, despises the film industry.

title: Agilan
desc: Madurai's ACP gets the heat from his seniors for his team's poor performance. In order to mend that, he plans a fake operation for his team. But his plan goes awry due to a meddling sub-inspector.

title: Shakalka Baby
desc: Sundaran and Pandi are married to two sisters who henpeck them and live together in the same house. When a young girl enters their house claiming to be pregnant, the men are distracted by her beauty

title: Raajakumaran
desc: Both Vaidehi and Selvi, who happen to be Rajakumaran's cousins, are in love with him. When Vaidehi decides to commit suicide, Rajakumaran is left heartbroken.

title: Mariyathai
desc: Annamalai is a highly respected man whose son, Raja, falls in love with Radha, a music teacher. Radha manages to manipulate Raja into giving up his property.

title: Pattayya Kelappannum Pandi Yaa
desc: Velpandiyan, a minibus driver, falls in love with Kanmani, a regular commuter of the bus. However, they face several challenges as their relationship grows further.

title: Iniyavaley
desc: Prabhakar is firm on marrying only after he clears his exams and becomes a collector. When his parents fix his marriage, his protests lead to complications and he ends up marrying the bride's sister.

title: Dummy Tappasu
desc: An obese man, living in the slums of Chennai, comes across a series of situations that change his perception towards life and love.

title: Ettu Thikkum Madha Yana
desc: When his father is found dead, Natesan decides to find the culprits. While investigating, he learns that his father's death is connected to the murder of his childhood friend.
